zh.lifeSummary: 當Andreas Widman於1604年5月10日在德國爾特波格受洗時，他的父親Leonhardt Widmann29歲，母親Barbara Kosels29歲。他於1630年7月4日與Catarina Bellinger在德國爾特波格萊昂格賀分根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andreas Widman于1604年5月10日在德国爾特波格受洗时，他的父亲Leonhardt Widmann29岁，母亲Barbara Kosels29岁。他于1630年7月4日与Catarina Bellinger在德国爾特波格萊昂格賀分根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Widman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element wid- (possibly from Old Swedish vithr ‘wood, forest’, or from a placename formed with Old Swedish vīd ‘wide’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element wid-.
Americanized form of South German   Widmann  .

variants.name: Widen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Gunnel, Iver, Lennart, Sven.
Swedish (Widén): ornamental or habitational name composed of the element Wid- (see Widman ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Widmark
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements Wid- (see Widman ) + mark ‘land’.

variants.name: Widmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhard, Armin, Christoph, Gerhard, Klaus.
South German: status name from Middle High German widem(e) ‘prebend’ (church-owned property in the form of land, a farm, etc. for agricultural use, mostly to support the village priest) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Widing
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name composed of the element wid- (see Widman ) + the suffix -ing ‘belonging to’.

variants.name: Widell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element Wid- (see Widman ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Andreas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

variants.name: Andries
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

en.lifeSummary: When Andreas Widman was christened on 10 May 1604, in Württemberg, Germany, his father, Leonhardt Widmann, was 29 and his mother, Barbara Kosels, was 29. He married Catarina Bellinger on 4 July 1630, in Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andreas Widman a été baptisé le 10 mai 1604, à Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Leonhardt Widmann, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Barbara Kosels, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Catarina Bellinger le 4 juillet 1630, à Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andreas Widman am 10. Mai 1604 in Württemberg, Deutschland getauft wurde, war sein Vater Leonhardt Widmann 29 und seine Mutter Barbara Kosels 29. Er hat am 4. Juli 1630 in Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Deutschland Catarina Bellinger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andreas Widman è stato battezzato il 10 maggio 1604 nel Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Leonhardt Widmann, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Barbara Kosels, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Catarina Bellinger il 4 luglio 1630, nel Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Andreas Widmanが1604年5月10日にドイツウuルッテンバーグで洗礼を受けた時，父Leonhardt Widmannは29歳，母Barbara Koselsは29歳であった。1630年7月4日にドイツウuルッテンバーグレオンバーグhoフィンジェンでCatarina Bellingerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Andreas Widman(이)가 1604년 5월 10일 독일 wu르테버그에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Leonhardt Widmann(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Kosels(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1630년 7월 4일 독일 wu르테버그 리버그 ho핀겐에서 Catarina Bellinger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andreas Widman foi batizado em 10 de maio de 1604, em Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Leonhardt Widmann, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Kosels, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Catarina Bellinger em 4 de julho de 1630, em Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andreas Widman был крещен 10 мая 1604 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Leonhardt Widmann было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Kosels, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Catarina Bellinger 4 июля 1630 г. в местности хoфинген, леонбирг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andreas Widman se bautizó el 10 de mayo de 1604, en Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Leonhardt Widmann, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Barbara Kosels, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Catarina Bellinger el 4 de julio de 1630, en Höfingen, Leonberg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
